TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tuapuu, title = Tuapuu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuapuu} }

S.FORM: alang Tuapuu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 60 buwan, 232 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 223 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 88%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Tuapuu hya' ga Likau-uan. tay 'zil na Tuapuu hya' ga Takimi. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tuapuu ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tuapuu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tuapuu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 60 buwan, 232 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 223 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 88%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Tuapuu hya' ga Likau-uan. tay 'zil na Tuapuu hya' ga Takimi. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tuapuu ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tuapuu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tuapuu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na tuapuu ħjaʔ ɣa likau-uan. taj ʔzil na tuapuu ħjaʔ ɣa takimi. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tuapuu ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tuapuu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
